name: Honey-Mustard Turkey Meatballs
recipeInstructions: Recipe by: Taste of Home DEC/JAN 1996 In a bowl, combine turkey, egg, crushed butter-flavor crackers, cheese, onion, ginger and 3 Tablespoons mustard. Form into 30 balls, each measuring about 2 inches in diameter. Place the meatballs in a greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes or until juice runs clear. In a saucepan, combine pineapple juice, green pepper, honey, cornstarch and onion powder; bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Cook and stir another 2 minutes; reduce heat. Stir in the remaining mustard until smooth. Brush meatballs with about 1/4 cup of the sauce and return them to the oven for an additional 10 minutes. Serve the remaining sauce as a dip for the meatballs.
